---
name: Security Report
about: Report a security vulnerability or concern.
title: "[SECURITY] "
labels: security
assignees: ""
---

**CRITICAL NOTE: DO NOT expose sensitive secrets, keys, or direct exploit payloads in public GitHub issues. If you have found a critical vulnerability, please follow our Security Policy or email the maintainers privately.**

**Describe the Security Concern / Vulnerability**
A clear and concise description of the security issue, describing the type of vulnerability (e.g. CSRF, XSS, SSRF, dependency vulnerability, hardcoded secret).

**Scope & Impact**
- Affected component: [e.g. backend api, frontend interface, terraform state, auth module]
- Potential impact if exploited: [e.g. data leak, privilege escalation, denial of service]

**Steps to Reproduce (if safe to share)**
Outline the general mechanism of the issue.

**Remediation Suggestion**
If you have suggestions on how this can be resolved (e.g., upgrading a specific library, sanitizing input, modifying IAM policies).
